slides.title: Warm up like *this*.
slides.sub: Skip it and you'll get hurt.

slides.title: Get *warm*
slides.body: 5 minutes of light cardio raises your core temp.

slides.title: Ramp the *weight*
slides.body: Build to your working weight with lighter sets.

slides.title: Open the *joints*
slides.body: Dynamic stretches for what you're about to train.

slides.title: Wake the *muscles*
slides.body: A few activation sets before the heavy work.

slides.title: Save the *stretching*
slides.body: Long static stretches before lifting kill strength.

slides.title: Warm up *right*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your training on track.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
